name: SmartBuilding Alerts
description: Subscribes to SmartBuilding MCP alert resources and delivers alerts into OpenClaw sessions (reference framework adapter).

mcpServer.description: SmartBuilding MCP server (Streamable HTTP) to subscribe to.

headers.description: Optional extra HTTP headers (e.g. Authorization) sent on every request.

cursorFile.description: Path to the persistent delivery cursor. Defaults to <OPENCLAW_HOME>/smartbuilding-alerts-cursor.json.

pollFallbackMs.description: Safety-net poll interval (ms) guarding against a lost notification. 0 = disabled.

monitors.description: Per-monitor routing. Key = monitor id (maps to smartbuilding://monitor/<id>/alerts).

alerts.description: Where this monitor's alerts are delivered.

agentId.description: Agent that owns the target session (resolves the JSONL path for FS-append).

deliver.description: true = channel delivery via subagent.run; false = raw FS-append into the session.
